referenceDecision.modeShape: Galaga-inspired two-player score lane and alternating-turn vocabulary. In the current Aurora runtime, 2UP is queued and must not score during 1UP's turn.
referenceDecision.startInput: Use arcade-conventional 1 PLAYER / 2 PLAYERS selection, with keyboard shortcuts 1 and 2.
referenceDecision.hudVocabulary: Use 1UP / HIGH SCORE / 2UP framing while the persona rival is active.
referenceDecision.leaderboardBoundary: Only the human 1UP score is leaderboard-eligible; queued 2UP and Watch Mode persona scores are comparative telemetry and user feedback.

sources.label: UVL Galaga manual-derived description
sources.evidence: Documents Galaga as a one- or two-player game; in two-player mode players take turns at the controls.

sources.label: MobyGames Galaga title/scoring screenshot
sources.evidence: Reference screenshot surface for title/scoring presentation.

sources.label: Galaga.cc browser control summary
sources.evidence: Documents 1 key for one-player start and 2 key for two-player start.

implementationNotes: Aurora does not yet have true alternating-turn multi-run state. This slice keeps 2UP queued during 1UP and adds a separate Watch Mode where personas can actively play for observation.
The persona rival and Watch Mode are intentionally excluded from local and remote score submission.
Future conformance work can evolve this into true Galaga-style alternating turns once save/restore of per-player convoy state is available.
